[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] '''Lun Tessra''' was the commander of the [[6/37th|6th squadron]] of the [[37th Imperial Fighter Wing]] in [[7 BBY/Legends|7 BBY]]. He had a case of "[[temp-flu]]" (not wanting to die before the remainder of his tour of duty was up), which led to [[Soontir Fel/Legends|Soontir Fel]] taking a greater part in running the squadron during its time fighting the [[Reslian Purge]].

==Appearances==
*[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 25|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 25]] {{1st}} {{Flash}}
